activities.name: Warm even in the shade

activities.description: 4 4-min intervals with 2-3 mins walking between. Intervals at 10 min/mile pace at 4-5% grade

activities.name: El Palo Alto
activities.description: With Grace… and revisited the place where I lived in 1988-9!

activities.name: To Hannibal’s Pass with John Hoyte and family and friends
activities.description: John lead the team who took an elephant over the pass in 1959. Such a memorable day!

activities.name: More of Hannibal’s likely trail
activities.description: Yesterday I visited the only pass where 30,000 troops + horses and elephants could plausibly camp together, which is clearly stated by Polybius, the best source. Today I took in the obvious connection from Le Plenay to this pass route. This trail became a major Roman route through the alps within 70 years of Hannibal’s time according to the excellent signage.

activities.name: Riverbed scramble towards “White Rock”
activities.description:
Polybius talks about a prominent white rock that provided some shelter for his troops while they were being harassed by locals. Bramans (en route to the Col de Clapier) has an extremely prominent white rock face. Whether this is what Polybius was talking about we cannot say. Didn’t get near enough to really assess how his troops could have benefitted from it, since I’m not quite as tough as Hannibal —I didn’t want to get wet feet.

(Trail actually shows the return journey)

activities.name: Final hike in the Val Cenis
activities.description: Not part of Hannibal’s route… just beautiful.

activities.name: The corn fields of Lyon airport
activities.description: Gotta love that farm land survives where the long term parking ends. On my way home now.

activities.name: Little hill repeats after a fun social time
activities.description: As I was about to take off  I ran into a friend I hadn’t seen for a couple of years, then struck up a conversation with another person who I think is going to become a friend. Gotta love Green Lake!

activities.name: Open comb, heading to coffee at Pacha
activities.description: Video memory of a beautiful valley in the French Alps from Thursday.

activities.name: Cardiac Rehab treadmill
activities.description: 6.2 mph at 3-5% for 4 mins at a time, x4

activities.name: It’s getting better
activities.description: 90 seconds improvement on my standard calibration run. Still a long way to go, but progress is progress.

activities.name: Tried to go slow, but still overheated
activities.description: In the furnace of 62F
